entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI.
Am I speaking with Maria?
No problem Patricia.
Hi
Are you calling for yourself or on behalf of someone else today?
Oh, I’m sorry, this is Patricia Brown.
Patricia, chest tightness and shortness of breath can be serious.
I’m calling for myself, I’ve been having some chest tightness and shortness of breath since yesterday.
If you are having severe symptoms, struggle breathing, chest pain, or feel faint, please hang up and call 911 or go to the nearest emergency room right away.
The symptoms aren’t severe right now, so yes, I’d like to go ahead and talk to the clinic team.
If your symptoms are mild and you feel safe to continue, I can help you get in touch with our clinic team.
Sure, it’s March 12, 1964.
Would you like to proceed?
Sure. It's Patricia, P-A-T-R-I-C-I-A, Brown, B-R-O-W-N.
Please tell me your date of birth.
Sure, it’s B-R-O-W-N.
Just to confirm, I have your name as Patricia Brown and your date of birth as March 12, 1964. Is that correct?
Of course, B as in boy, R, O, W, N.
If so, could you please spell your first and last name for me?
I think the number on file should be 425-789-2341.
Thanks Patricia. Could you please spell your last name for me?
Yes, that’s correct.
Could you please spell out your entire last name, letter by letter?
Alright, I’ll hold.
Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record? If so, please tell me the number you have on file with us.
Oh, all right then. Thank you, goodbye.
If you're not sure, just let me know.
I have your phone number as 425-789-2341 and your date of birth is March 12, 1964. Is that correct?
I can't proceed further right now, but I'll make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.
Please stay on the line while I connect you to someone who can help.
Connecting you to a representative.
Please wait.
Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.
Goodbye.
